modelEn: Asta Gear Crescent 2 20D Silione Nylon 2persons windproof ,rainproof camping Tent
description: Asta : Performance and Fabric Aesthetics Brand Origin of AstaGear AstaGear---Pioneer of lightweight camping equipment.In 2013,a young man with passion for the outdoor industry and a skilled outdoor equipment designer founded AstaGear. From the first day of AstaGear’s establishment, we are designing and making high-quality &lightweight silicone nylon tent. We hope that through the efforts of Asta Gear , we can bring more popular lightweight camping equipment from Europe and America to our country. Design Philosophy Crescent 2 is our first mountaineering tent. is a two-person sleeping solution at 3000-4000 altitudes. Its combination of outwear and hanging guarantees the rapid construction of tents, especially in snowy days, which reduces the risk of loss of temperature and quickly builds shelters for mountain friends. In addition, the two-point crossover design was adopted in Xueyue. The traditional single-point crossover design of the tent itself is more stable, which makes the tent more wind-resistant. model: Asta Gear SKYLARKS 2persons Tent 20D Doubleside silicone Windproof Rainproof and UL tent
modelEn: Asta Gear SKYLARKS 2persons Tent 20D Doubleside silicone Windproof Rainproof and UL tent
description: ASTA GEAR SKYLARKS Wind -proof Rain -resistant Ultralight Design Philosophy How to balance weight and space is a question we have been considering. Satisfying 2 person’s sleeping space, resisting strong wind, coping with more terrain environment and ensuring the lightweight of tent are the real product requirements we face when designing skylarks. We adopt a double Y structure, the tent can stand on its own, and meet most of the terrain and climates. At the same time, we have applied our unique adjustable“bird wing” structure on sky larks, which can open and close the bird wing ventilation according to the weather conditions, and adjust the air circulation inside the tent. The Skylark has traveled many hiking routes through the validation of tens of thousands of outdoor fans since its launch.
